title: Bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes

source.subject: chore(submodules): bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes

body:
Superrepo submodule pointer advances the compiler to pick up runtime-bridge e2e fixes and `ffi_v03` CI stabilization landed in the compiler repo.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`8ba01c8`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8ba01c8)
- **Subject:** chore(submodules): bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
